dimensions.statistic: global annual mean tas anomaly relative to linear fit of piControl run

executions/recipe/work/tcr/calculate/Can.long_name: Time series of the global annual mean near-surface air temperature anomaly ΔT of the 1% CO2 increase per year experiment for model CanESM5 (ensemble member r1i1p1f1). Anomalies are calculated relative to a pre-industrial control simulation of the same model. The horizontal dashed line indicates the transient climate response (TCR) defined as the 20-year average ΔT centered at the time of CO2 doubling (vertical dashed lines).

executions/recipe/work/tcr/calculate/tcr.long_name: Transient Climate Response (TCR) for multiple climate models.

<OUTPUT_DIR>/executions/recipe/index.htm.description: Page showing the executions of the ESMValTool run.
